case_title: PENGUIN CONSULTING CORP VS IKEDA, MIYAKO

docket_entries.description: THE DEC. 7, 2004 AT 1:30PM SCHEDULE IS FOR COMPUTER PURPOSES ONLY SINCE IT WON'T ACCEPT THE SAME DATE SCHEDULING OF THE MOTION.
MOTION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT IKEDA, MIYAKO HEARING SET FOR DEC-07-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WAS RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT IKEDA, MIYAKO
RETURN OF DEBTOR'S REQUEST RE: ENTRY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO PENGUIN CONSULTING CORP.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF DEC-07-2004, DENIED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, MIYAKO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PENGUIN CONSULTING CORP AS TO DEFENDANT IKEDA, MIYAKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2004 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
GENERIC MOTION FOR DEMURRER IS SCHEDULED FOR DECEMBER 3, 2004 AT 8:30 AM SAME COURT DATE AS THE HEARING ON THE CLAIM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENGUIN CONSULTING CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IKEDA, MIYAKO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $552.00, MOTION FOR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WAS "APPROVED" ON OCTOBER 10, 2008. COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES.
